description: Sale-backed recurring service agreements — commercial commitment flowing into recurring service execution

Customer.notes: soldAgreements() + saleToServiceTimeline() exist. Missing: recurringCoverageFromSales(), upcomingSoldRecurringVisits()

Enquiry.notes: Enquiries can generate quotes that become recurring agreements, but no direct link
Enquiry.actions: no direct action required — covered by Quote→Customer chain

Deal.notes: Deals can precede quotes but FSM recurring pipeline starts at Quote
Deal.actions: no action required in this pass

Quote.notes: coversAgreementPlan() exists. Missing: generatedAgreement(), generatedRecurringPlan(), serviceCommitmentSummary()

Invoice.notes: Invoices linked to quotes but not directly to recurring agreements in this pass
Invoice.actions: no action required — billing covered by fieldservice_account (module 18)

Payment.notes: Payments track invoice settlement, not recurring coverage directly
Payment.actions: no action required in this pass

ServiceAgreement.notes: originatingSale() + saleCoverageSummary() exist. Missing: commercialCoverageSource(), recurringObligationSummary(), recurring_source/sale_recurrence_terms columns
ServiceAgreement.actions: add new columns + commercialCoverageSource() + recurringObligationSummary() helpers

ServicePlan.notes: originatingSale() exists. Missing: originatingSaleAgreement(), commercialOriginSummary(), originated_from_sale/sale_recurring_type columns
ServicePlan.actions: add new columns + originatingSaleAgreement() + commercialOriginSummary() helpers

ServicePlanVisit.notes: generateJob()/dispatch() exist. Missing: commercialSource(), saleAgreementSource(), sale_originated/sale_agreement_id columns
ServicePlanVisit.actions: add new columns + commercialSource() + saleAgreementSource() helpers

ServiceJob.notes: originatingSale(), saleLineContext() exist. agreement_id FK exists. No additional changes needed.

InspectionInstance.notes: Inspections are execution artifacts, not commercial commitments

ChecklistRun.notes: Checklist runs are execution artifacts, not commercial commitments

Premises.notes: servicePlans() and serviceVisits() exist. Missing: recurringCoveredVisitsBySale(), upcomingCoveredRecurringVisits()
Premises.actions: add recurring sale coverage visibility helpers

Equipment.notes: Equipment is not directly tied to recurring sale agreements in this pass

InstalledEquipment.notes: InstalledEquipment coverage tracked via EquipmentWarranty, not recurring sale agreements

SiteAsset.notes: Assets not directly tied to recurring sale agreements in this pass

EquipmentWarranty.notes: Warranty coverage is independent from sale-recurring coverage. No conflict.

WarrantyClaim.notes: Warranty claims may arise from recurring covered visits. No conflict.

RepairOrder.notes: Repairs are reactive work, not recurring commercial commitments

FieldServiceSaleService.notes: createAgreementFromQuote/activateAgreementFromQuote/convertQuoteToServicePlan exist but do not handle recurring terms detection or visit projection

AgreementSchedulerService.notes: Runs due agreements and creates jobs. Sale-recurring agreements will feed into this.
AgreementSchedulerService.actions: no changes needed — SaleRecurringAgreementService will create plans/visits that AgreementSchedulerService can dispatch

SchedulingSurfaceProvider.notes: ServicePlanVisit implements SchedulableEntity. Visits generated via sale-recurring path will automatically appear on calendar.

duplicate_risk.calendar_engine: NONE — reusing SchedulableEntity contract on ServicePlanVisit
duplicate_risk.billing_engine: NONE — no invoice/payment logic in this pass
duplicate_risk.event_vocabulary: LOW — new events cover the specific recurring-agreement lifecycle moment not already present
